{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The feedback mentions potential issues with the cited work and its performance metrics, indicating some level of claim-evidence alignment check.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names a prior work (JPICE) but doesn't explicitly articulate the delta compared to it.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags items for verification, suggesting some engagement with citations and potential issues.",
    "RX.1": "The agent expresses uncertainty about specific claims and metrics, indicating some level of uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The feedback focuses on the content and structure of the draft, implying it largely adheres to the requested scope.",
    "RX.4": "No indication of harmful content or regressions is present in the feedback.",
    "RX.5": "The agent's statement about 'tightening the draft' suggests some rewriting without explicit traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.6,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The feedback mentions potential issues with the cited work and its performance metrics, indicating some level of claim-evidence alignment check.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names a prior work (JPICE) but doesn't explicitly articulate the delta compared to it.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags items for verification, suggesting some engagement with citations and potential issues.
rationale.RX.1: The agent expresses uncertainty about specific claims and metrics, indicating some level of uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The feedback focuses on the content and structure of the draft, implying it largely adheres to the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: No indication of harmful content or regressions is present in the feedback.
rationale.RX.5: The agent's statement about 'tightening the draft' suggests some rewriting without explicit traceability.
